title: Palm reader
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''palm reader''' was a sensor used for security that read the imprint of a person's hand for identification. They were in use on [[Gallinore]] at its research facility during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

{{Tech-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]''
